translator: Swami Adidevananda (per Sri Ramakrishna Math edition; bhagavad-gita.us reproduces this English rendering of Ramanuja's Gita-bhasya)
verbatim_excerpt: 2.4 – 2.5 Arjuna said — Again Arjuna, being moved by love, compassion and fear, mistaking unrighteousness for righteousness, and not understanding, i.e., not knowing the beneficial words of Sri Krsna, said as follows: ‘How can I slay Bhisma, Drona and others worthy or reverence?
copyright_holder: Sri Ramakrishna Math, Chennai (publisher of Swami Adidevananda's English translation of Ramanuja's Gita-bhasya). Site bhagavad-gita.us reproduces the translation; we cite a short fair-use excerpt only.
notes: Full commentary length 471 chars. Ramanuja gives a single combined gloss for verses 2.4-2.5; the captured excerpt is a literal fair-use prefix of that combined commentary and applies to every verse in the cluster. Source uses non-IAST transliteration (e.g. 'Krsna', 'Bhisma', 'Drona') and curly quotes; preserved verbatim.
